name: voyant

commit.message:
docs: Revise README to clarify functionality and quick start instructions

- Updated the description of the Voyant Travel Assistant to emphasize its single meta-agent architecture.
- Streamlined the quick start section for clarity and conciseness.
- Added details on how the meta-agent processes requests and the benefits of its design.
- Removed outdated sections and improved overall readability.

docs: Update agent decision flow and prompts to include hotel search and clarify API routes

- Modified AGENT_DECISION_FLOW.md to reflect the addition of hotel search in Amadeus integration.
- Enhanced PROMPTS_FLOW.md to list current routes available in the meta agent, including hotels.
feat: Add Amadeus hotel search integration and enhance agent tools

feat(tools): Add hotel search functionality with Amadeus integration

- Implemented amadeusSearchHotels tool for searching hotel offers based on city and dates.
- Enhanced hotelOffersSearch function to normalize dates and handle fallback scenarios.
- Updated routing logic to include hotels in allowed tools for specific queries.
- Revised prompts in meta_agent.md and planner.md to incorporate hotel search guidance.

feat(cli, tools, llm): Inject current date for relative date resolution in LLM

- Updated CLI banner for improved aesthetics.
- Added current date injection in chat messages to enhance temporal context for LLM.
- Enhanced tool argument normalization for better compatibility with planner and tool schemas.
- Introduced tests to verify current date injection functionality in planning and chat messages.

refactor(tools): Enhance attractions tool with context support and concurrency

- Updated getAttractions and related functions to accept a context parameter for better logging and signal handling.
- Implemented concurrency in fetching attraction details to improve performance.
- Adjusted summarization and filtering functions to utilize context for enhanced observability and control.

feat(cli): Add debug script and enhance CLI output formatting

- Introduced a new CLI debug script for improved logging during development.
- Enhanced output formatting in the CLI to include styled blocks for user and assistant messages.
- Updated weather tool calls to include logging capabilities for better observability.

refactor(cli): Update CLI banner and add early exit for banner testing

- Enhanced CLI banner for clarity and engagement.
- Added early exit functionality for testing purposes when BANNER_TEST environment variable is set.
- Changed log level for session store initialization and metrics server startup to debug for improved verbosity.
Merge branch 'dev'

refactor(tools): Enhance tool routing and execution logic

- Updated allowedToolsForRoute to improve tool selection for web, policy, visas, attractions, and destinations.
- Implemented deterministic execution of planned tool calls to ensure receipt generation when the model fails to issue calls.
- Revised prompts in meta_agent.md and planner.md to prioritize tools-first approaches for destinations and attractions.
- Adjusted tests to reflect changes in tool call strategies and ensure proper verification of tool outputs.

test(tests): Update Jest configuration and enhance packing verification

- Changed module settings in Jest config to use ES2022 and bundler resolution.
- Refactored packing tool path resolution for improved clarity and consistency.
- Enhanced error handling in packing tool to provide clearer failure reasons.
- Updated verification tests for attractions and packing to include API key checks.

test(tests): Refactor verification logic in attraction, packing, and policy tests

- Replaced helper function with direct import for fetching verification artifacts.
- Increased wait time for verification completion to ensure artifacts are available.
- Updated mock implementations for consistency in test outputs across all relevant files.

test(tests): Improve verification wait logic in attraction and packing tests

- Added explicit wait for verification completion in attractions and packing verification tests.
- Enhanced packing test to retry fetching verification artifact to ensure it is available.
- Maintained consistency in verification checks across all relevant test files.

test(tests): Initialize session store in beforeAll for verification tests

- Updated beforeAll hooks in attractions, packing, and policy verification tests to initialize session store.
- Added a delay in packing verification test to ensure completion of verification process.
- Introduced a new weather routing test to validate tool exposure during weather queries.

feat(tools): Enhance weather tool routing and prompt guidance

- Updated allowedToolsForRoute to prioritize the dedicated weather tool over generic search.
- Modified meta_agent.md to specify using the weather tool with structured input.
- Revised planner.md to enforce single calls to the weather tool, avoiding generic search unless necessary.

fix(session): Update default session store to Redis and enhance config handling

- Changed default session store from memory to Redis for improved performance.
- Updated session configuration to allow fallback to memory if Redis URL is not set.
- Modified tests to reflect new default behavior and ensure proper handling of session store configurations.

refactor(tests): Enhance Jest configuration and add session store tests

- Updated Jest configuration to include custom TypeScript settings and transform ignore patterns.
- Refactored `optimizeSearchQuery` to simplify quote removal logic.
- Added cleanup methods to in-memory store and test app for better resource management.
- Introduced unit tests for session configuration, memory management, prompts, and logging utilities.
- Ensured comprehensive coverage for session store functionality and search tools.

feat(agent): Add threadId support for tool calls and enhance search query handling

- Introduced threadId to ToolCallContext for better context management.
- Updated tool call functions to persist last search query for follow-up commands.
- Enhanced prompts to guide users on upgrading search requests based on previous queries.

feat(prompts): Introduce planner prompt and remove obsolete policy prompts

- Added a new planner prompt to streamline routing and tool call management.
- Deleted outdated policy classifier and page relevance prompts to reduce redundancy.
- Updated routing guidance for improved handling of travel-related queries.

refactor(consent): Remove consent message handling from core

- Deleted the consent message types and related functions from consent_text.ts.
- Updated documentation in meta_agent.md to clarify consent gating process and message generation.
- Streamlined consent request approach to generate concise yes/no messages with reasons.

feat(docker): Add Docker Compose configuration for Redis service

- Introduced a new docker-compose.yml file to set up a Redis service.
- Configured Redis with persistent storage, health checks, and restart policies.
- Ensured Redis is accessible on port 6379 for local development.

fix(tools): Increase timeouts for crawling and request handling

- Updated callChatWithTools timeout from 20s to 45s to accommodate longer crawling processes.
- Enhanced CheerioCrawler settings by increasing requestHandlerTimeoutSecs and navigationTimeoutSecs to 30s.
- Adjusted maxRequestRetries to 2 for improved resilience during crawling operations.

feat(cli): Implement pipeline status updates for enhanced user feedback

- Introduced a structured pipeline status system to provide real-time updates during processing stages.
- Updated Spinner class to manage and display current processing stage messages.
- Enhanced main function to trigger pipeline updates, improving user experience during interactions.

feat(agent): Refine ideas/destinations routing logic for improved AI-first approach

- Updated routing instructions to prioritize structured engine calls over web tools when specific cities are unknown.
- Enhanced logic to infer regions from user text and set conditions for fallback to deepResearch or search based on confidence levels.

fix(tests): Import handleChat dynamically in verification tests

- Updated attractions, packing, and policy receipts verification tests to dynamically import handleChat.
- Ensured consistent usage of handleChat across test files for improved clarity and maintainability.
- Adjusted test assertions to validate the presence of threadId and verdicts from verification artifacts.

feat(tests): Add foundational test environment and verification helpers

- Introduced a centralized test environment loader to configure essential environment variables for tests.
- Created new test files for verifying attractions, packing, and policy receipts with LLM verification.
- Implemented HTTP mocking utilities for integration tests to ensure deterministic behavior.
- Added receipt and verification fetching helpers to streamline test assertions and improve clarity.
- Established Jest setup for consistent test configurations across all test suites.

feat(docs): Add GitHub link to documentation header for easy access

- Included a GitHub link in the documentation header to enhance user accessibility to the project repository.
Merge branch 'dev'

feat(tools): Enhance tool functions with AbortSignal support and improved timeout handling

- Updated getCountryFacts and detectLocationWithLLM to accept AbortSignal for better timeout management.
- Enhanced classifyWithLLM and callLLM to propagate AbortSignal, ensuring consistent cancellation behavior across tool calls.
- Refactored domain authenticity scoring to improve clarity and maintainability.

refactor(docs): Revise README and flow diagrams for Meta-Agent

- Updated README to reflect the new Meta-Agent branding and architecture.
- Enhanced agent decision flow and prompts flow diagrams for clarity and consistency.
- Improved quick start instructions and documentation organization for better user experience.

feat(agent): Update meta agent timeout and enhance tool execution logic

- Increased maxSteps to 10 and timeoutMs to 60000 for improved tool call handling.
- Added logic to ensure sufficient time for final synthesis after tool execution.
- Enhanced fallback behavior to synthesize replies with sources when available.

feat(agent): Enhance tool orchestration and planning execution flow

- Updated callChatWithTools to handle planning JSON echoes and ensure proper execution of tool calls.
- Introduced logic to detect planning JSON and nudge the model to transition from planning to execution.
- Added minimal Jest setup for testing and created policy execution flow tests to validate tool orchestration.

refactor(docs): Update agent decision flow and prompts documentation

- Revised agent decision flow diagram for clarity and consistency with the Big LLM First approach.
- Enhanced prompts flow documentation to detail the structure and purpose of key prompts.
- Improved readability and organization of the documentation for better user understanding.

feat(api): Enhance context handling and session message limits

- Added context retrieval and intent tracking in the API routes for improved verification.
- Updated session message limit handling to support dynamic configuration via environment variables.
- Enhanced in-memory and Redis store message retrieval and appending logic to ensure proper limits are enforced.

feat(agent): Revamp agent decision flow and enhance tool orchestration

- Reworked the agent decision flow to implement a Big LLM First approach, streamlining the orchestration of meta-agent tasks.
- Updated tool registry and planning prompts to improve routing, consent handling, and execution of LLM tools.
- Enhanced receipt management by ensuring all facts include a source, improving traceability and observability.
- Configured API to allow larger payloads for preserving full context during interactions.

feat(agent): Enhance meta agent and tool call logging for improved observability

- Added SHA-256 hash logging for meta prompts and planning prompts to track prompt versions.
- Updated citation handling in tool calls to prioritize explicit identifiers and deduplicate URLs.
- Removed heuristic numeric normalization in favor of AI-first prompt verification for groundedness.
- Revised visa policy guidelines to ensure accurate duration reporting and source alignment.

feat(metrics): Enhance observability with new stage metrics and error handling

- Added new metrics for tracking stages in the meta agent and tool calls, including blending, routing, and verification stages.
- Improved error handling and logging for metric observations to ensure robustness in monitoring.
- Updated the metrics server initialization to optionally start in-process for better coherence with the main application.

feat(metrics): Enhance observability with additional metrics and error handling

- Introduced new metrics for tracking tool errors, verification runs, web allowlist blocks, sanitization actions, and citation domains.
- Updated existing functions to incorporate error categorization and logging for improved monitoring.
- Enhanced the `sanitize` function to log sanitization actions, contributing to better observability of data processing.

feat(tools): Enhance packingSuggest tool with enriched fact handling

- Added logic to enrich facts for the packingSuggest tool, allowing for better blending and verification with curated items.
- Updated the summary format in suggestPacking to include weather conditions for improved user context.
- Revised prompt guidelines to emphasize conciseness and structured output for packing suggestions.

feat(tools): Add packingSuggest tool for weather-based packing recommendations

- Implemented packingSuggest function to generate packing lists based on city, month, and interests.
- Integrated weather data to determine packing conditions (hot, mild, cold) and curated item suggestions.
- Updated tool input contracts and prompts to include packing parameters and guidelines for usage.
- Enhanced allowed tools logic to prioritize packingSuggest over deep research for packing queries.

feat(tools): Implement execution ledger for tool call deduplication and routing control

- Added an ExecutionLedger class to manage tool call deduplication and skip logic based on previous outcomes.
- Introduced metrics for tracking tool call hits, skips due to prior failures, and gated skips based on routing.
- Enhanced the callChatWithTools function to utilize the ledger for improved tool execution management.
- Implemented host blocking logic in various search tools to filter out blocked hosts from results.

feat(prompts): Expand slot extraction and tool input contracts for travel domain

- Introduced a structured slot model for travel-related queries, detailing required and optional fields.
- Enhanced date normalization processes for better user experience and accuracy.
- Defined input contracts for various tools to ensure consistent data handling.
- Established orchestration rules for flight-related queries to streamline tool interactions.
- Added guidelines for duplication prevention and research behavior to improve efficiency.

refactor(prompts): Clarify policy retrieval and domain verification process

- Revised guidance for composing answers to ensure citations are from official domains only.
- Emphasized the prohibition of third-party summaries and the need for consent in case of uncertainty.
- Updated notes to specify the sequence of tools for policy tasks, reinforcing structured tool usage.

refactor(agent): Update meta agent context handling and remove obsolete policy browser

- Enhanced context handling by updating timeout for `runMetaAgentTurn` and clarifying comments on user message persistence.
- Removed the obsolete `policy.browser.graph.ts` file and its associated logic to streamline the codebase.
- Updated tool imports to reflect the new `extractPolicyWithCrawlee` function for improved policy extraction.

refactor(prompts): Revise policy retrieval sequence and enhance control guidance

- Updated the policy retrieval process to enforce official domain checks and structured tool calls.
- Clarified the sequence for retrieving official policies, emphasizing the use of vectaraQuery, search, and deepResearch.
- Added guidance on handling mismatched domains and the prohibition of aggregator tools for policy queries.
feat(prompts): Add multi-prompt file combining all the legacy prompts for further references

refactor(prompts): Revise policy retrieval process and enhance tool call structure

- Updated policy retrieval pipeline to prioritize RAG and official domain citations.
- Clarified usage of web search and deep research for complex queries.
- Improved control guidance for tool calls, emphasizing structured arguments and conditions.

refactor(tools): Remove LLM dependencies in Amadeus flights and simplify date handling

- Eliminated micro-prompt parsers for IATA resolution and date extraction, relying on deterministic logic and Amadeus reference endpoints.
- Updated `deepResearchPages` function to accept options for engine selection and max pages, enhancing configurability.

feat(tools): Add policyDiscover tool for comprehensive policy retrieval

- Introduced `policyDiscover` tool to find policy details using RAG, web search, and Playwright crawling.
- Implemented query complexity assessment to optimize routing decisions.
- Updated prompts to reflect new tool capabilities and complexity handling in routing logic.

refactor(meta-agent): Simplify slot inference and context handling

- Removed lightweight slot inference logic from `runMetaAgentTurn` to streamline processing.
- Updated comments to clarify the role of the meta prompt in inferring and resolving slots.
- Retained functionality to persist the last user message for improved context continuity.

feat(meta-agent): Enhance context handling and slot inference

- Added functionality to persist the last user message for improved deictic resolution.
- Implemented lightweight slot inference to enhance context continuity, including city extraction using LLM.
- Updated slot management to normalize and merge inferred slots with existing context.
- Improved logging for slot updates and receipt storage in `runMetaAgentTurn`.

feat(tools): Add new tools for PNR parsing, web search, and deep research

- Introduced `pnrParse` tool for parsing free-form PNR text into structured objects.
- Added `search` tool for web searches with optional deep research capabilities.
- Implemented `vectaraQuery` for semantic policy queries with citations.
- Created `deepResearch` tool for multi-pass web research with deduplication.
- Enhanced `destinationSuggest` and `irropsProcess` tools for better user recommendations and disruption handling.
- Improved logging and error handling in `callChatWithTools` for better observability.

refactor(prompts): Revise meta-agent prompt for clarity and structure

- Updated the meta-agent prompt to enhance clarity and organization of operating principles and core cycle.
- Introduced a tool-first doctrine and grounding controls to improve response accuracy and reliability.
- Expanded sections on consent gating, error handling, and output discipline for comprehensive guidance.
- Streamlined slot expectations and context handling to ensure better user interaction and intent recognition.

feat(logging): Enhance debug logging across agent and core modules

- Added detailed debug logs in `meta_agent.ts` to track message processing, context slots, and receipt storage.
- Improved logging in `blend.ts` for chat handling, including message lengths and citation processing.
- Enhanced `llm.ts` with logging for API request details and error handling.
- Updated `parsers.ts` to log intent detection and slot extraction processes.
- Improved verification logging in `verify.ts` to capture response details and error handling.

refactor(tools): Improve planning step and error handling in callChatWithTools

- Updated the planning step in `callChatWithTools` to use best-effort control JSON requests.
- Enhanced error handling to log failures during planning without interrupting execution.
- Cleaned up variable names for clarity and consistency in message handling.

chore(graph, core, prompts): Remove unused files and clean up codebase

- Deleted obsolete files including `main.graph.ts`, `transformers.ts`, and various core modules to reduce clutter.
- Cleaned up prompt files to remove outdated or unnecessary content.
- Streamlined the codebase for improved maintainability and readability.

refactor(index, tools, blend): Clean up exports and enhance tool integration

- Removed unused router export from `index.ts` to streamline module exports.
- Updated `callChatWithTools` in `tools/index.ts` to include new metrics for route confidence and routing decisions.
- Enhanced `blend.ts` to improve handling of user messages and integrate new planning steps for tool calls.
- Added tests for tool interactions and metrics tracking in `meta_agent.spec.ts` to ensure functionality and coverage.

feat(metrics): Enhance meta-agent metrics and performance tracking

- Integrated new metrics for meta-agent operations, including tool call counts, latency tracking, and citation management.
- Updated `runMetaAgentTurn` to observe turn latency and increment receipts written.
- Enhanced `callChatWithTools` to track tool call metrics and parse failures.
- Added a lightweight kid-friendly filter for attractions using LLM prompts.
- Introduced a smoke test for the meta-agent to ensure basic functionality.

feat(agent): Introduce Meta-Agent for enhanced routing and tool integration

- Added `meta_agent.ts` to implement the Meta-Agent functionality, handling routing, slot inference, and tool selection.
- Created `meta.graph.ts` to define the state graph for the Meta-Agent's operations.
- Implemented `callChatWithTools` in `index.ts` to facilitate tool interactions within the Meta-Agent.
- Updated `blend.ts` to route requests to the Meta-Agent when BIG_LLM_MODE is enabled.
- Added `meta_agent.md` prompt to guide the Meta-Agent's behavior and responses.

feat(preferences, prompts): Introduce user preferences extraction and integration

- Added `preferences.ts` to handle user preferences extraction and storage.
- Updated prompts for preference extraction and destination summarization to include user preferences.
- Enhanced `destinationsNode` to ensure user preferences are available in slots and utilized in prompt generation.
- Modified consent message for clarity in user interaction.

refactor(policy): Simplify browser mode logic for receipt requests

- Adjusted conditions for triggering browser mode to only activate when receipts are explicitly requested.
- Clarified comments to reflect the new logic and improve code readability.

refactor(policy): Change tryBrowserMode to private and improve flight slot extraction

- Updated `tryBrowserMode` method visibility to private for encapsulation.
- Enhanced flight routing logic to minimize stale context slots during fast-path intent detection.

feat(graph, policy): Enhance policy receipt handling and browser mode integration

- Implemented Playwright-based receipt retrieval when requested by the user.
- Summarized and formatted policy receipts for improved clarity in responses.
- Stored facts and decisions related to policy receipts for better tracking and verification.
- Refactored `tryBrowserMode` method to be public for broader access within the policy agent.

feat(tests): Add coverage configuration and new test command for Jest

- Configured Jest to collect coverage data from TypeScript files, excluding specific files.
- Set coverage thresholds to ensure minimum quality standards are met.
- Introduced a new npm script `test:coverage` to run tests with coverage reporting enabled.

feat(policy): Enhance domain scoring and search query handling for policy retrieval

- Updated `scoreDomain` to include clause in domain authenticity scoring.
- Modified `classifyWithLLM` to accept clause, improving cache key and prompt generation.
- Enhanced `policyUrlHeuristicScore` to prioritize help/legal pages over loyalty terms.
- Introduced `buildPolicySearchQuery` for clause-specific search query construction.
- Added unit tests for `policyUrlHeuristicScore` to ensure correct scoring behavior.

feat(graph): Implement main graph structure for intent routing and slot management

- Introduced `main.graph.ts` to define a state graph for handling user intents and managing slots.
- Added nodes for guarding, routing, clarifying, and acting on user messages to streamline processing.
- Implemented functions for checking missing slots and handling consent verification within the graph flow.

refactor(nlp, blend, router): Streamline LLM integration and clarify slot handling

- Removed unused `classifyContentLLM` function from blend.ts to reduce redundancy.
- Introduced new clarifier and parser functions in nlp.ts for improved slot extraction.
- Updated router.ts to avoid unnecessary LLM slot extraction, enhancing clarity in flight clarification handling.

refactor(core): Remove unused preference and search result extractors

- Deleted `preference-extractor.ts`, `search-result-extractor.ts`, `transformers-consent-classifier.ts`, and `transformers-nlp-facade.ts` to streamline the codebase and eliminate redundancy.

refactor(graph, nlp, router): Remove unused methods and streamline intent detection

- Eliminated deprecated `routeToDomain` and `incrementCounter` functions to reduce code surface area.
- Replaced `performWebSearchNode` with `performWebSearchUnified` for consistent handling of web search results.
- Removed overlapping intent and slot detection logic to avoid duplication and improve clarity in routing.

refactor(context, session): Enhance intent relationships and session scope handling

- Added minimal allowlist for proven transitions in context management to improve intent preservation.
- Updated session management to respect session scope, allowing for 'global' or 'process' modes in session validation.

refactor(blend, router): Streamline search and context handling

- Integrated `performWebSearchUnified` in blend.ts for improved search consistency and citation management.
- Removed deprecated consent detection functions in router.ts, centralizing consent handling in slot_memory.
- Enhanced context management by deferring slot extraction and context resets to dedicated functions, improving clarity and maintainability.

refactor(graph): Streamline search functionality and remove deprecated methods

- Consolidated search logic by integrating `performWebSearchUnified` for consistent receipts and citations.
- Removed unused `sanitizeSearchQuery` function and deprecated `performWebSearchNode` to simplify the codebase.
- Updated weather node logic to enhance slot extraction handling.

refactor(blend): Integrate consent messaging and enhance packing logic

- Added `getConsentMessage` function to centralize consent-related replies.
- Updated fallback responses in `handleChat` to utilize consent messages for clarity.
- Refined packing logic to conditionally handle missing slots based on intent.
- Improved packing reply formatting for better readability and context awareness.

refactor(metrics-dashboard): Revamp layout and styling for improved usability

- Replaced legacy styles with a modern design system, enhancing visual consistency.
- Updated HTML structure to improve accessibility and responsiveness.
- Introduced new sections for metrics and alerts, streamlining user interaction.
- Enhanced JavaScript functionality for dynamic data fetching and rendering.

fix(router): Improve context handling for placeholder location terms

- Added logic to prefer prior context over newly inferred cities when messages contain placeholder terms like "there" or "here".
- Ensured explicit resolution of placeholder tokens, preventing LLM mis-inference and maintaining accurate context.
Merge branch 'dev'

refactor(domain_authenticity): Enhance domain scoring and relevance assessment

- Updated domain scoring logic to utilize strict JSON output for LLM responses.
- Introduced a new relevance scoring mechanism for policy pages, integrating AI-driven assessments with fallback regex checks.
- Improved caching strategy for domain scores to prevent stale data and ensure accurate scoring based on context.
- Added new prompts for policy page relevance to standardize output and enhance classification accuracy.

refactor(prompts): Enhance policy intent classification with airline details

- Added `company` slot to capture airline names in policy-related queries.
- Updated examples to reflect the new structure, improving clarity and intent detection accuracy.
- Revised prompt guidelines to include airline policies for comprehensive user support.

chore: Update .gitignore and ESLint configuration for improved compatibility

- Added AGENTS.md to .gitignore to prevent tracking of agent documentation.
- Modified ESLint configuration to include all JS/TS file types and improved global definitions for Node.js and Jest.
- Ensured test files are recognized with the updated file patterns for better linting coverage.

refactor(graph): Change variable declarations from let to const for intent and city

- Updated variable declarations in graph.ts and llm.ts to use const instead of let for better immutability.
- Improved code readability and adherence to best practices by ensuring variables that do not change are declared as constants.

refactor(prompts): Remove unused prompts and unify intent detection

- Deleted obsolete prompts for city name extraction, flight complexity detection, and search query optimization.
- Consolidated intent detection by integrating it with the primary router prompt to prevent drift and enhance classification accuracy.
- Updated preloadPrompts function to reflect these changes and ensure consistent prompt loading.

refactor(prompts): Revise prompt structures for city extraction and query optimization

- Updated city name extraction prompts to enforce strict JSON output and clarified requirements for handling context and candidates.
- Enhanced complexity assessor prompt to specify strict JSON format and concise reasoning for complexity determination.
- Improved search query optimizer prompts to ensure strict JSON output, with clear guidelines for query structure and confidence calibration.
- Standardized output formats across various prompts to maintain consistency and improve parsing accuracy.
Merge branch 'dev'

refactor(metrics): Update search upgrade tracking and persist user queries

- Replaced the upgrade request tracking function with a more detailed observation of search quality metrics, incorporating confidence levels.
- Added functionality to persist the user's last searchable query, enhancing follow-up query accuracy and context for upgrades.
- Improved error handling during metric observations and query updates for robustness.

refactor(domain_authenticity): Update domain scoring logic and cache versioning

- Introduced a new cache versioning scheme to prevent stale scores when prompt guidance changes.
- Added functions to determine if a subject looks like a country and to override scores based on domain characteristics.
- Enhanced the domain scoring logic to differentiate between official and unofficial sources based on the subject context.
- Updated documentation to clarify scoring rules and examples for better understanding.
Merge branch 'dev'
Move test file from src to tests directory to fix build
Resolve merge conflict in weather.ts - keep metrics version

refactor(metrics): Revise metrics dashboard and enhance data handling

- Updated the metrics dashboard to reflect new data structures and terminology, improving clarity and responsiveness.
- Refactored pipeline health metrics to utilize a new data format, enhancing success rate calculations and latency reporting.
- Improved confidence correlation metrics by integrating quality data and refining display logic for better user insights.
- Enhanced search quality metrics to align with updated data sources, ensuring accurate tracking of search performance.
- Streamlined external API metrics handling to improve observability and error reporting across various targets.

feat(tests): Introduce endless testing script and e2e scenarios

- Added a new script for running endless tests with a metrics server, allowing for continuous testing and monitoring of system performance.
- Implemented end-to-end test scenarios to validate the handling of various user queries and track metrics during interactions.
- Enhanced the metrics ingestion process to support new metrics related to stage latency and verification success, improving observability of test outcomes.
- Updated the metrics server to log successful ingestion events, ensuring better traceability of metrics data.

refactor(logging): Standardize debug logging across router and crawlee_research modules

- Replaced console.log statements with conditional console.debug calls in the router and crawlee_research files to improve logging granularity based on the log level.
- Ensured consistent logging practices to enhance traceability and performance during debugging sessions.
- Updated the metrics utility to handle potential undefined values, improving robustness in metric calculations.

refactor(logging): Update logging to use debug level for improved traceability

- Replaced console.log statements with console.debug in various modules to enhance logging granularity based on log level.
- Updated the blend, irrops_engine, slot_memory, verify, and crawlee_research files to conditionally log debug information, improving performance and clarity during debugging sessions.
- Ensured consistent logging practices across the codebase to facilitate better monitoring and troubleshooting.

feat(metrics): Enhance metrics dashboard and tracking capabilities

- Added new testing scripts to facilitate endless testing and metrics server functionality.
- Updated the metrics dashboard layout for improved clarity and responsiveness, including a new alerts banner and a collapsible debugging guide.
- Renamed sections and metrics to align with production debugging terminology, enhancing user understanding of the dashboard.
- Introduced new metrics tracking for pipeline stages, confidence analysis, and external dependencies, providing deeper insights into system performance.
- Refactored existing metrics tracking to support new data structures and improve overall observability.

feat(metrics): Add verification metrics to pipeline health tracking

- Enhanced the metrics dashboard to include verification success and failure rates for each pipeline stage, improving the ability to monitor result quality.
- Updated the rendering logic to display verification rates alongside existing success and latency metrics, providing a more comprehensive view of pipeline performance.
- Modified the metrics tracking system to accommodate new verification metrics, ensuring accurate data collection and reporting.

feat(metrics): Revamp metrics dashboard and enhance data tracking

- Updated the metrics dashboard to reflect new terminology and improved clarity, including renaming sections and metrics for better alignment with production debugging.
- Introduced new metrics for pipeline health, confidence correlation, and search quality, enhancing the ability to monitor system performance and identify bottlenecks.
- Refactored existing metric rendering logic to accommodate new data structures and improve overall responsiveness of the dashboard.
- Enhanced error handling and data presentation for external API performance and system health metrics, ensuring better visibility into operational issues.

feat(metrics): Track upgrade requests for search quality metrics

- Added functionality to track upgrade requests in the search quality metrics system, enhancing the ability to analyze search performance.
- Integrated asynchronous import for metrics observation, allowing for real-time updates on search quality and complexity assessment.
- Updated the metrics system to include placeholder complexity for upgrade requests, improving data granularity and insights.

feat(search, metrics): Enhance search quality tracking and complexity assessment

- Integrated asynchronous complexity assessment into the search process to improve responsiveness.
- Added new metrics for tracking search quality, including complexity rates and average confidence, to provide deeper insights into search performance.
- Updated the metrics system to capture detailed search quality data, facilitating better analysis of search effectiveness and user engagement.

feat(search): Integrate confidence tracking and enhance search result handling

- Added confidence metrics to search results in both Brave and Tavily search functions, allowing for better assessment of search quality.
- Implemented functions to store and retrieve last search confidence, facilitating correlation with verification outcomes.
- Enhanced metrics tracking to include confidence correlation for router and verification stages, improving overall observability.
- Updated the metrics system to capture search quality data, including complexity and query type, for more granular performance insights.

feat(metrics): Enhance external metrics tracking and stage observation

- Introduced new metrics tracking for external API calls, including detailed status reporting and query context.
- Added stage observation functionality to monitor performance across different processing stages (guard, extract, route, gather).
- Improved error handling and logging for various search and weather-related functions, ensuring better traceability of failures and successes.
- Updated the metrics system to capture additional context such as query type, location, and domain, enhancing the granularity of performance insights.
- Refactored existing functions to integrate the new metrics tracking, improving overall observability of the system.

refactor(blend, graph, router, slot_memory): Improve logging, session management, and query handling

- Enhanced logging throughout the blend, graph, and router modules for better debugging and traceability.
- Updated session management to preserve session metadata during state updates, preventing session invalidation.
- Refactored query handling to utilize the most relevant user message for search upgrades, improving context accuracy.
- Simplified consent state clearing logic to focus on specific keys, ensuring important data remains intact.
- Improved the handling of receipts and verification data across various functions to maintain consistency in user interactions.

readme_html:
Voyant Travel Assistant

Voyant is a travel assistant with one disciplined meta-agent instead of a committee in a trench coat. It plans tool calls, executes them, stores receipts, and verifies the answer before speaking too confidently.

Quick Start

Run cd root && npm install && npm run build && npm run start for the API, or cd root && npm run cli for the terminal flow. Minimum env is LLM_PROVIDER_BASEURL plus LLM_API_KEY or OPENROUTER_API_KEY; travel and search keys stay optional until you need those tools.

How It Works

The meta-agent analyzes the request, picks tools, executes them asynchronously, blends the response, then records receipts and optional verification artifacts. The result is a fast travel workflow with provenance, which is more useful than eloquence on its own.

Perks

  • One-agent orchestration with strict JSON control instead of vague tool chaos.
  • Receipts and /why-style verification for answers that need to stand up later.
  • Resilient I/O, explicit timeouts, and a test suite that leans toward real conversations.
